entries.name: Sacred Geometry
entries.definition: Sacred Geometry provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
roles: Uses Sacred Geometry principles for empowerment
contributions: Sacred Geometry teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
Wisdom governance balances authority with compassion
True power serves the highest good of all beings

attributes.governor_essence: A Sacred Geometry Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by sacred geometry principles.
